name: Preset MCP Skills
description: AI agent skills for Superset MCP tool workflows only. Do not use for direct API work.

skills.name: preset-mcp
skills.description: Route Superset MCP tool workflows with a strict no-direct-API boundary; do not use for direct API work.

skills.name: preset-mcp-discovery
skills.description: Use Superset MCP health, instance, list, detail, schema, and chart-type discovery tools; do not use for direct API work.

skills.name: preset-mcp-data
skills.description: Use Superset MCP data-returning tools for chart data, previews, rendered SQL, and dataset query results; do not use for direct API work.

skills.name: preset-mcp-visualization
skills.description: Use Superset MCP tools for Explore links, chart previews, saved charts, and chart updates; do not use for direct API work.

skills.name: preset-mcp-dashboard
skills.description: Use Superset MCP tools for dashboard inspection, dashboard creation, and adding charts to dashboards; do not use for direct API work.

skills.name: preset-mcp-sqllab
skills.description: Use Superset MCP tools for SQL execution, SQL Lab links, and saved SQL queries; do not use for direct API work.

skills.name: preset-mcp-datasets
skills.description: Use Superset MCP tools for dataset inspection, semantic-layer querying, and virtual dataset creation; do not use for direct API work.

skills.name: preset-mcp-troubleshooting
skills.description: Troubleshoot Superset MCP health, validation, permission, response-size, and bug-report workflows; do not use for direct API work.
